violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by broken down cardboard boxes. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Refuse was moved during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area by the large chest freezer, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of various dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Bowls were removed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 1-door reach-in refrigerator and the prep unit. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following areas; -Floors underneath fryolators and wok stations -Working surfaces of fryolator and wok stations -Ansul pipes and hood ventilation system -Interior surfaces of the walk-in cooler and fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment and facilities shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The floor tiles in the kitchen area were observed cracked and missing several tiles and is in overall poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by kitchen equipment. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Equipment was moved during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

Working containers of various dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Labels were placed on containers during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of various dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Bowls were removed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following areas; -Floors underneath fryolators and wok stations -Working surfaces of fryolator and wok stations -Ansul pipes and hood ventilation system -Interior surfaces of the walk-in cooler and fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment and facilities shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

The floor tiles in the kitchen area were observed cracked and missing several tiles and is in overall poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026
